description: WCAG 2+ extension layer: automated-or-manual rules for creative, civic, educational, and multimodal interfaces that go beyond conventional HTML audits.

rules.title: Canvas needs an accessible description
rules.description: Canvas-based sketches need text descriptions so nonvisual users can understand the sketch.
nextSteps: Add p5 describe() for the overall canvas.
Use describeElement() for important objects or interactions.
Use textOutput() or gridOutput() when shape descriptions are useful.

rules.title: Mouse/touch-only interaction needs a keyboard alternative
rules.description: Interactions driven only by mousePressed, mouseDragged, mouseMoved, or touchStarted are unusable without a pointing device.
nextSteps: Add keyPressed() handling or visible button controls that trigger the same behavior.
Ensure focus order and focus indication are clear for any added controls.

rules.title: Continuous animation needs a pause or reduce-motion control
rules.description: Sketches with a running draw() loop that animates continuously can be disorienting or triggering without a way to pause or reduce motion.
nextSteps: Avoid motion that is not essential to the sketch's meaning.
